result.reason: The core logic for exporting and importing settings already exists in LocalSettingsManager.cs, but it needs to be exposed through the UI and potentially enhanced for user-friendly migration between computers.
result.approach: Create a new UI element within an existing settings form (e.g., FrmOptions.cs) to allow users to trigger the existing ExportSettings and ImportSettings methods from LocalSettingsManager.cs, prompting for a file path for the JSON settings.
